Prediction: No

The current visit record does not provide any explicit evidence of a lipid disorder such as hypercholesterolemia, hyperlipidemia, or any other specific lipid metabolism disorder. The diagnoses listed primarily focus on cardiovascular conditions and complications related to procedures, but there is no mention of lipid levels, lipid disorders, or ongoing management of such conditions. The absence of any recorded medications related to lipid management further supports the conclusion that there is no current diagnosis of a lipid metabolism disorder. Therefore, based on the information provided, it is unlikely that "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" will be diagnosed in the patient's next hospital visit.
